nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Raymonde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Raimund, of Germanic origin, from ragin ‘advice, decision’ + mund ‘protector’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. Subsequently it dropped out of use, but was revived in the middle of the 19th century, together with several other given names of Old English and Norman origin.

en.lifeSummary: When Raymonde de Bourgogne was born in 1107, her father, Hugues II duc de Bourgogne, was 22 and her mother, Mathilde de Mayenne, was 14. She had at least 1 daughter with Guy d'Auvergne II. She died in 1145, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raymonde de Bourgogne est née en 1107, son père, Hugues II duc de Bourgogne, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Mayenne, avait 14 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Guy d'Auvergne II. Elle est décédée en 1145, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Raymonde de Bourgogne 1107 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues II duc de Bourgogne 22 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de Mayenne 14. Sie hatte mit Guy d'Auvergne II mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1145 im Alter von 38 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Raymonde de Bourgogne è nata il nel 1107, sua padre, Hugues II duc de Bourgogne, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Mathilde de Mayenne, aveva 14 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Guy d'Auvergne II. Morì nel 1145, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Raymonde de Bourgogneが1107年に生まれた時，父Hugues II duc de Bourgogneは22歳，母Mathilde de Mayenneは14歳であった。彼女はGuy d'Auvergne IIとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1145年に38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Raymonde de Bourgogne(이)가 1107년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues II duc de Bourgogne(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de Mayenne(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 Guy d'Auvergne II(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1145년 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raymonde de Bourgogne nasceu em 1107, seu pai, Hugues II duc de Bourgogne, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Mayenne, tinha 14 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Guy d'Auvergne II. Ela faleceu em 1145, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raymonde de Bourgogne родилась в 1107 г., её отцу по имени Hugues II duc de Bourgogne было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Mayenne, 14. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Guy d'Auvergne II. Она умерла в 1145 г. в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Raymonde de Bourgogne nació en 1107, su papá, Hugues II duc de Bourgogne, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Mayenne, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Guy d'Auvergne II. Murió en 1145, a la edad de 38 años.
